query:
-- Check which individual author_profiles rows exist for the co-authors
SELECT authorName, enrichedAt IS NOT NULL as enriched, avatarUrl IS NOT NULL as has_avatar
FROM author_profiles
WHERE authorName IN (
  'Ashvin Vaidyanathan', 'Ruben Rabago',
  'Colin Bryar', 'Bill Carr',
  'Frances Frei', 'Anne Morriss',
  'Jack Stack', 'Bo Burlingham'
)
ORDER BY authorName;
